description: Top-level workflow schema for deck workflows.

artifacts.description: Declarative prepare artifact inventory. Prefer this over legacy prepare download steps in new role: prepare workflows.

items.description: One file artifact to place under the bundle files/ root.

output.description: Bundle file output. path is relative to the files/ root and must not start with files/.

items.description: A grouped set of images to collect during prepare.
A grouped set of packages for one or more OS targets to collect during prepare.

title: DeckWorkflow
